page_content:
Prerequisite: BUSO602.

Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H. Smith School of Business.

BUSO602 Financial Accounting (2 Credits)

Overview of financial accounting, periodic financial statements and

the financial reporting process. Importance of financial statements as information source for creditors and investors and as a means by which managers can communicate information about their firms.

Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H. Smith School of Business.

Credit Only Granted for. EMBA610 or BUSO602.
